message:
feat(layout,widgets): stable coherent layout with measurer, table filter/sort, and list binary search

Layout engine:
- Add Flex::split_with_measurer_stably() combining intrinsic sizing with
  temporal coherence via CoherenceCache
- solve_constraints_with_hints() accepts optional coherence parameter to
  load previous allocations and minimize jitter across frames
- FitContent constraint now clamps preferred size to hint min/max bounds
- Derive Clone on CoherenceCache for embedding in widget state

Table widget:
- Add filtered_and_sorted_indices() for client-side filter + sort on rows
- All row rendering, scrolling, selection, and hit-testing now go through
  display_indices (filtered/sorted view) rather than raw rows
- Column layout uses split_with_measurer_stably() for temporal coherence
- Sort indicator (triangle_up/down) drawn on sorted column header
- Tracing span reports both total_rows and visible_rows

List widget:
- Navigation in filtered lists uses binary_search instead of linear
  position() for O(log N) lookup
- Remove duplicate KeyCode::Char(ch) match arm with stricter modifiers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
